subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Although numerous letters have been written during this extended period to both old and new friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی هر چند نامه های متعدده در این مدت مدیده باحبای قدیمه و جدیده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
